creator: crum.zach@gmail.com
text:
update.freebsd.org does not include 
  10.1-RC4/ 
  to-10.1-RC4/ 
directories

FTP site includes tar files for the base system.
  ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/10.1-RC4
  ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/10.1/  


freebsd-update outputs the following:
  Fetching metadata signature for 10.1-RC4 from update6.freebsd.org... failed.
  Fetching metadata signature for 10.1-RC4 from update4.freebsd.org... failed.
  Fetching metadata signature for 10.1-RC4 from update5.freebsd.org... failed.
  Fetching metadata signature for 10.1-RC4 from update2.freebsd.org... failed.
  Fetching metadata signature for 10.1-RC4 from update3.freebsd.org... failed.
  No mirrors remaining, giving up.


Though this report most likely doesn't belong here, I'm not certain where else to file it. Sorry 'bout that.
